title: Sweet Sour Filipino Couscous Sinigang
description: A sweet and sour Filipino dish featuring couscous, yuzu cure, and sugar free friendly ingredients, perfect for a hangover cure. This sinigang style dish is a twist on traditional Filipino cuisine.
instructions: Rinse the couscous in a fine mesh sieve and drain well.
Heat 2 cups of water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
Add the couscous to the boiling water, cover, and turn off the heat.
Let the couscous steam for 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
Heat the yuzu juice, fish sauce, and lime juice in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced tomato, onion, and green chili to the saucepan and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the spinach and cook until wilted.
Combine the cooked couscous and yuzu mixture in a large bowl and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
